response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates excellent software engineering fundamentals and 15+ years of experience, they are a poor fit for this industrial automation C++ role. Their recent career has focused on JavaScript/Node.js web development, with C++ expertise appearing dormant for 10+ years. Most critically, there is no evidence of industrial automation domain knowledge, embedded systems experience, security standards (IEC 62443, SDL), or familiarity with industrial protocols and IoT—all core to the position.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and active mentorship at scale
15+ years of diverse technical experience showing architectural thinking and ability to design event-driven systems
Active in technical community with workshops and talks, indicating knowledge-sharing mindset and communication skills
concerns: C++ expertise is dormant (last significant work 10+ years ago); recent career pivoted to JavaScript/Node.js web technologies
Zero evidence of industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT, or control system development experience
No demonstrated knowledge of critical security standards (IEC 62443, SDL) or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, MQTT, OPC UA)
